messages.content:
Translate into English: Ваша задача - набрать как можно больше очков зарабатываемых за объединения одинаковых смайлов.
Для успешной игры вам понадобится внимательность и дальновидность.

Your task is to earn as many points as possible by combining the same emojis.
To play successfully, you will need attentiveness and foresight.

Translate into English: Зарабатывайте очки, объединяя одинаковые смайлы в более крупные.
Грамотно сбрасывайте новые смайлы, иначе экран переполнится и партия завершится.
Нажмите пальцем (тапните) или кликните левой кнопкой мыши по игровой области, чтобы сбросить новый смайлик.
Соединив два самых больших смайла, вы заработаете много очков и освободите место.

Earn points by combining identical emojis into larger ones.
Carefully discard new emojis or else the screen will overflow and the game will end.
Tap or click on the game area to discard a new emoji.
By combining the two largest emojis, you will earn a lot of points and free up space.

translate into Turkish: Merge identical emoji so that they can unite into a bigger emoji.
It’s not so simple because the emojis have physics!

Aynı emojileri birleştirerek daha büyük bir emoji oluşturun.
Emojilerin fiziksel özellikleri olduğu için bu iş o kadar da kolay değil!

translate into Turkish: Your task is to earn as many points as possible by combining the same emojis.
To play successfully, you will need attention and foresight.

Aynı emojileri birleştirerek mümkün olduğunca çok puan kazanmanız gereken görevdir.
Başarılı bir şekilde oynamak için dikkat ve öngörüye ihtiyacınız olacak.

translate into Turkish: Earn points by combining identical emojis into larger ones.
Carefully discard new emojis or else the screen will overflow and the game will end.
Tap or click on the game area to discard a new emoji.
By combining the two largest emojis, you will earn a lot of points and free up space.

Benzer emojileri birleştirerek daha büyük olanlara dönüştürerek puan kazanın.
Yeni emojileri dikkatli bir şekilde atın yoksa ekran taşar ve oyun biter.
Yeni bir emojiyi atmak için oyun bölgesine dokunun veya tıklayın.
En büyük iki emojiyi birleştirerek çok fazla puan kazanabilir ve yer açabilirsiniz.

translate into German: Merge identical emoji so that they can unite into a bigger emoji.
It’s not so simple because the emojis have physics!

Vereinige identische Emojis, damit sie zu einem größeren Emoji werden können.
Es ist nicht so einfach, da die Emojis eine physikalische Komponente haben!

translate into German: Earn points by combining identical emojis into larger ones.
Carefully discard new emojis or else the screen will overflow and the game will end.
Tap or click on the game area to discard a new emoji.
By combining the two largest emojis, you will earn a lot of points and free up space.

Verdiene Punkte, indem du identische Emojis zu größeren Emojis kombinierst.
Wirf neue Emojis vorsichtig weg, ansonsten wird der Bildschirm überfüllt und das Spiel endet.
Tippe oder klicke auf den Spielbereich, um ein neues Emoji wegzuwerfen.
Durch das Kombinieren der zwei größten Emojis wirst du viele Punkte verdienen und Platz frei machen.

translate into German: Your task is to earn as many points as possible by combining the same emojis.
To play successfully, you will need attention and foresight.

Deine Aufgabe ist es, so viele Punkte wie möglich zu verdienen, indem du die gleichen Emojis kombinierst.
Um erfolgreich zu spielen, benötigst du Aufmerksamkeit und Voraussicht.

translate into spanish:  Your task is to earn as many points as possible by combining the same emojis.
To play successfully, you will need attention and foresight.

Tu tarea es ganar la mayor cantidad de puntos posible combinando los mismos emojis.
Para jugar exitosamente, necesitarás atención y previsión.

translate into spanish: Merge identical emoji so that they can unite into a bigger emoji.
It’s not so simple because the emojis have physics!

Combina emojis idénticos para que puedan unirse y formar un emoji más grande.
No es tan sencillo debido a que los emojis tienen física.

translate into spanish: Earn points by combining identical emojis into larger ones.
Carefully discard new emojis or else the screen will overflow and the game will end.
Tap or click on the game area to discard a new emoji.
By combining the two largest emojis, you will earn a lot of points and free up space.

Gana puntos combinando emojis idénticos en emojis más grandes.
Descarta cuidadosamente los nuevos emojis, de lo contrario, la pantalla se desbordará y el juego terminará.
Toca o haz clic en el área del juego para descartar un nuevo emoji.
Al combinar los dos emojis más grandes, ganarás muchos puntos y liberarás espacio.

translate into Portuguese: Merge identical emoji so that they can unite into a bigger emoji.
It’s not so simple because the emojis have physics!

Junte emojis idênticos para que possam se unir em um emoji maior.
Não é tão simples porque os emojis têm física!

translate into Portuguese: Your task is to earn as many points as possible by combining the same emojis.
To play successfully, you will need attention and foresight.

Sua tarefa é ganhar o máximo de pontos possível combinando os mesmos emojis.
Para jogar com sucesso, você precisará de atenção e visão de futuro.

translate into Portuguese: Earn points by combining identical emojis into larger ones.
Carefully discard new emojis or else the screen will overflow and the game will end.
Tap or click on the game area to discard a new emoji.
By combining the two largest emojis, you will earn a lot of points and free up space.

Ganhe pontos combinando emojis idênticos em outros maiores.
Descarte cuidadosamente os novos emojis, caso contrário a tela vai transbordar e o jogo vai acabar.
Toque ou clique na área do jogo para descartar um novo emoji.
Ao combinar os dois maiores emojis, você ganhará muitos pontos e liberará espaço.

translate into Japanese: Merge identical emoji so that they can unite into a bigger emoji.
It’s not so simple because the emojis have physics!

同じ絵文字を結合して、より大きな絵文字になるようにしてください。
ただし、絵文字には物理的な特性があり、それほど簡単ではありません！

translate into Japanese: Your task is to earn as many points as possible by combining the same emojis.
To play successfully, you will need attention and foresight.

同じ絵文字を組み合わせてできるだけ多くのポイントを獲得することがあなたのタスクです。
成功裏にプレイするためには、注意力と先見の明が必要です。

translate into Japanese: Earn points by combining identical emojis into larger ones.
Carefully discard new emojis or else the screen will overflow and the game will end.
Tap or click on the game area to discard a new emoji.
By combining the two largest emojis, you will earn a lot of points and free up space.

同じ絵文字を組み合わせることでポイントを獲得します。絵文字をよく考えて捨てないと画面が溢れてゲームが終了します。
新しい絵文字を捨てるには、ゲームエリアをタップまたはクリックしてください。
最も大きな2つの絵文字を組み合わせると、多くのポイントを獲得し、スペースを確保することができます。

translate into Hindi: Merge identical emoji so that they can unite into a bigger emoji.
It’s not so simple because the emojis have physics!

एक बड़े इमोजी में विलय करके एक समान इमोजी को विलयित करें।
यह इतना सरल नहीं है क्योंकि इमोजी में भौतिकी है!

translate into Hindi: Your task is to earn as many points as possible by combining the same emojis.
To play successfully, you will need attention and foresight.

आपका कार्य है, एक ही इमोजी को जोड़कर संभवतः अधिक से अधिक अंक अर्जित करना।
सफलतापूर्वक खेलने के लिए, आपको ध्यान और पूर्वदृष्टि की आवश्यकता होगी।

translate into Hindi: Earn points by combining identical emojis into larger ones.
Carefully discard new emojis or else the screen will overflow and the game will end.
Tap or click on the game area to discard a new emoji.
By combining the two largest emojis, you will earn a lot of points and free up space.

एक-जैसे इमोजी को बड़े इमोजी में मिलाकर अंक कमाएँ।
नई इमोजी को सावधानीपूर्वक खारिज करें, अन्यथा स्क्रीन भर जाएगी और खेल समाप्त हो जाएगा।
नई इमोजी को खारिज करने के लिए खेल क्षेत्र पर टैप या क्लिक करें।
दो सबसे बड़े इमोजी को मिलाकर आपको बहुत सारे अंक मिलेंगे और जगह खाली हो जाएगी।
